name: Wolf Spider

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It dips and snaps with a sharp fang strike.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block precisely or step out of the frontal line.
attacks.notes: Its basic attack, but it already applies poison.

attacks.name: 5-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It keeps pressing forward and chains a long set of rapid bites.
attacks.howToAvoid: Keep blocking or dodge the full sequence; missing one often opens you to the rest.

attacks.name: Charged Lunge
attacks.tell: It roars, pulls back briefly, and then lunges with a long-reaching bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Perfect-block it or late-dodge sideways; if it whiffs, there is a brief punish window.
attacks.notes: Breaks guard if not perfect-blocked and applies the deadliest status effect in the fight.

attacks.name: Jump Attack
attacks.tell: It jumps through the air and crashes down on the player’s location.
attacks.howToAvoid: Run out of the landing point or dodge right as it comes down.
attacks.notes: Can stagger even when blocked and heavily disrupt your rhythm if it catches you planted.

description: A large nocturnal predator of the yard. Its combination of constant poison, close-range pressure, and stealthy patrols makes it one of Grounded 1’s most feared creatures.
behavior: It sleeps during the day, patrols in the late afternoon, at night, and in the early morning, and makes a very recognizable snoring sound while resting. It does not freely patrol during the first three in-game days of a save.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player and can begin drifting toward them even before direct sight if they enter its detection radius. All of its bites apply poison, and its charged lunge adds a stronger venom effect.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive toward other spiders and neutral to most other creatures until attacked. It can also steal stinkbug parts from player storage.
strategy: Spicy damage and cutting weapons help, but discipline matters more: keep the combo rhythm, respect the jump, and do not swing blindly when it enters its defensive stance. Repeated kills unlock Mithridatism.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 75
5-Combo Bite: 60
Charged Lunge: 100
Jump Attack: 95

specialTraits: All of its bites build poison. The charged lunge applies a more dangerous venom effect that lasts much longer.
It does not freely patrol during the first three in-game days, although it remains hostile if disturbed while sleeping.
